ext.description: Lint commit messages with bundled commitlint templates (Conventional, PHP/Laravel, Node, Python). Scaffold config via folder right-click or the sidebar tree view; check the last commit through the CLI from the palette or sidebar.

checkLastCommit.command: Shell command run by 'Check Last Commit Message' in the workspace terminal. Default: `npx --yes commitlint --from HEAD~1 --to HEAD --verbose`.

commands.initFromTemplate: Vibecode - Init From Commit Lint Template
commands.addTemplate: Vibecode - Add Commit Lint User Template
commands.runAllChecks: Vibecode - Run All Commit Lint Checks
commands.revealChecksFolder: Vibecode - Open Commit Lint Checks Folder
commands.scaffoldDefaultChecks: Vibecode - Scaffold Default Commit Lint Checks
commands.showCheckOutput: Vibecode - Show Commit Lint Check Output

runtime.Pick a commitlint template to scaffold: Pick a commitlint template to scaffold

runtime.No commitlint.config.* found in {0}. Sca: No commitlint.config.* found in {0}. Scaffold one from a template first?
runtime.Will be appended after the timestamp pre: Will be appended after the timestamp prefix (yymmddhhmmss-<name>).
runtime.Use only letters, digits, dot, underscor: Use only letters, digits, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
